query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A four-by-four grid of flat, solid color squares arranged in four rows and four columns with no visible borders between cells. The top row contains bright yellow, yellow-green, white, and dark green squares. The second row contains dark red, orange, dark red, and green squares. The third row contains very dark brown, near-black, dark maroon, and dark olive squares. The bottom row contains yellow-green, bright green, forest green, and very dark green squares.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A four-by-four grid of flat, solid color squares arranged in four rows and four columns with no visible borders between cells, featuring a clashing and disharmonious palette. The top row contains bright yellow, yellow-green, white, and dark green squares. The second row contains dark red, orange, dark red, and green squares. The third row contains very dark brown, near-black, dark maroon, and dark olive squares. The bottom row contains yellow-green, bright green, forest green, and very dark green squares. The aggressively conflicting saturated hues and unbalanced juxtaposition of neon warm tones against discordant greens create deliberate visual tension and an unsettling chromatic composition.
